pageContext.name: Chick & Flying Sunfish
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are excited to present the Chick & Flying Sunfish Statue!  This statue is hand-painted on resin and stands approximately 11' tall. This Michihiro Matsuoka x Manas S+U+M statue is limited to 300 pieces worldwide so don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection today!
